overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay showing high-speed driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates through heavy traffic on multi-level highways, takes a sharp ramp curve with a near-collision, and ends in a traffic jam under an overpass.

events.description: turning right from city street onto highway entrance
entering shadow of elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating through downtown streets and merging onto the highway

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
multi-level highway structure with yellow railings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a neon-lit downtown street with tall futuristic buildings. The vehicle accelerates and turns right onto a highway entrance, passing under an elevated highway structure as the lighting shifts to shadow.

events.description: weaving between lanes to overtake slower vehicles

agents.ego_description: high-speed driving under multiple levels of highway infrastructure, overtaking traffic

entered.detail: massive concrete columns supporting the highway above
safety barriers with yellow paint marking the road edges

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the elevated highway system through an urban canyon of concrete pillars. The vehicle weaves through moderate traffic while neon advertisements glow on the sides, approaching a ramp entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with sharp curves and yellow barriers

events.description: taking sharp right turn on elevated ramp
sideswiping a purple van while merging back into traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp curved ramp at high speed, colliding with a van while merging

notable_agents.action: purple van driving parallel that gets sideswiped by the ego vehicle

entered.detail: elevated highway ramp with sharp banking turns
large metal framework buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a sharply curved elevated ramp, navigating the bend at high speed. While merging back into traffic, it makes contact with a purple van on the left, causing a collision before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway section with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering fully covered highway section under overpass
accelerating to high speed while overtaking multiple vehicles

agents.ego_description: high-speed highway driving through covered sections with heavy traffic

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisements with neon colors
enclosed road section under concrete overpass

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered highway section adorned with massive holographic billboards. The vehicle accelerates through dense traffic, navigating between other cars in the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested highway underpass with traffic jam

events.description: slowing down as traffic congestion becomes visible ahead
coming to a complete stop in traffic jam under overpass

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop in heavy traffic congestion under the highway overpass

entered.detail: dense pack of stationary vehicles with brake lights illuminated

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle slowing down as it approaches a major traffic jam under the highway overpass. The scene becomes darker as the vehicle comes to a complete stop behind a line of cars with glowing red brake lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis that transitions from open downtown streets into a congested urban canyon. It begins on a vibrant city street before the vehicle accelerates and turns right, passing under an elevated highway structure where the lighting shifts into deep shadow. As the camera weaves through concrete pillars and glowing advertisements, the path opens into a sharply curved elevated ramp where the vehicle clips a purple van during a high-speed merge. The scene then shifts into a covered highway section dominated by massive holographic billboards, with the vehicle threading through dense traffic. Finally, the momentum slows as the car enters a dark overpass, coming to a complete stop amidst a sea of glowing red brake lights in a major traffic jam.
